markdown:
#  Reactivate a Batch of User Accounts in the Company Directory 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/permissions)
  * The users you reactivate on the Company level Directory will also be added to all projects they were added to before.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Directory** tool.
  2. Click **Inactive Users**.
  3. Mark the checkbox next to each user that you want to reactivate or mark the checkbox at the top of the list to select all Inactive Users.
  4. Click **Bulk Actions** and select **Reactivate**.
  5. In the 'Reactivate Users' window, click **Reactivate** to reactivate the users or click **Cancel** to cancel the action.


## See Also
  * [Deactivate User Accounts in the Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/inactivate-a-batch-of-user-accounts-in-the-company-directory)
  * [Who is impacted once Procore MFA is enabled at my company?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-who-is-impacted-once-procore-mfa-is-enabled-at-my-company)
  * [Directory (Company) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/permissions)
title: Reactivate a Batch of User Accounts in the Company Directory
description: How to reactivate user profiles listed in the Inactive Users tab of the Company Directory.
